chain.thought: Explanation: Reviewing the "led" column, the only year with laps led is 1928 with 33 laps; all other years show 0 laps led. Therefore, the year with the most laps led is 1928.

judge_thought: Explanation: The "led" column shows laps led each year. All years have 0 laps led except 1928, which has 33 laps led—the highest. Therefore, the year with the most laps led is 1928.
